root: ^Darius: Good evening, Lyra. I see you're still awake.
^Lyra: The night has always been my favorite time to think, Darius.
^Darius: I understand. The quiet hours can be quite peaceful.
^Lyra: Exactly. It's when the world slows down and you can truly reflect.
^Darius: Reflection is important, but so is rest. Don't stay up too late.
^Lyra: I'll be fine. I've always been a night owl.
^Darius: Very well. Just remember, even the most vigilant need their rest.
^Lyra: I appreciate your concern. I'll head to bed soon.
